rationale.risk-routing: Learned policy selects which actions require live developer review.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Action guards and plan checkpoints let developers approve or block execution.
rationale.oversight-explanation: Check-ins, summaries, and policy views explain oversight decisions.
rationale.agent-scope-drift: Constraints, specifications, and phase guards bound departures from intended work.
rationale.provenance-auditability: Persistent governance traces support developer inspection of actions and check-ins.
